negative_controls.name: naive symmetric continuation fails

negative_controls.evidence: The probe records m=182,x=21 and x=63 with one section cycle [181] but return-time sum far below m^4.

proof_style: Type-A all-pair/boundary/macro quotient certificate, unless a different full-layered parity-changing template is discovered.
required_branch_data: closed packet/count formula, not a fixed x=z law
finite gate state set and transition formula
insertion distribution from boundary/macro section to all-pair section
label or label-destination time mass polynomials
search_guidance: Do not promote a symmetric x=z streak directly.
Prefer outputs that expose a finite gate graph and insertion lengths.
Use timeout-safe search runs and preserve compact summaries, not raw massive maps.
A candidate is not proof-facing until it supplies return equations, no-early facts, and time exhaustion.
